message:
Merge PR #2919: fix(deps): update go x/ packages

Updates golang.org/x/term v0.41.0 and golang.org/x/text v0.35.0.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2919
Author: renovate[bot]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
